resources.string: I am a magnet for positive energy.
Every day, I am becoming a better version of myself.
I am resilient, strong, and brave.
I trust the process and embrace the journey.
My mind is full of brilliant ideas.
I choose to be happy and grateful today.
I am worthy of all the good things that come my way.
I radiate confidence, self-respect, and inner harmony.
I have the power to create the life I desire.
